description: Entries about travel plans, asking about upcoming trips

memory_chunks.content: Booked flights to Japan for October. Flying into Tokyo, then a few days in Kyoto, and ending in Osaka. I've been planning this trip for two years.
Started learning basic Japanese phrases using an app. Managed to memorize how to say hello, thank you, and how much does this cost. Small steps.
Researching ryokans in Kyoto. The traditional inn experience seems essential. Some of the options are expensive but I want to do this trip properly.
Made a list of food I must try in Japan: ramen, sushi at Tsukiji, takoyaki in Osaka, and a proper kaiseki meal. The food is honestly the part I'm most excited about.

query: What travel plans do I have coming up?
